data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Subscriber-to-endpoint ownership checks', but the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding this specific requirement. The prior steps focus on various booking and member actions but lack specific details on ownership checks between subscribers and endpoints. This indicates a clear gap in the evidence needed to confirm that the requirement is satisfied.
evidencePointers: No evidence provided for subscriber-to-endpoint ownership checks.
gaps: Lack of evidence confirming subscriber-to-endpoint ownership checks.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add ownership check validation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify subscriber-to-endpoint ownership.
